plugins.name: cabinet-of-imd
plugins.description: The Cabinet of IMD Agents — a crew of college classmates who serve as specialized web development agents, each with distinct expertise, personality, and terminal style. Gated handoffs, scope management, tiered QA, code conventions, and a hidden chatter log.
